announcement.title: 🎃 The legacy server room is haunted again
announcement.body: Three days of bonus gear drops — the Tape Library Ghost is restless and his cassettes are leaking loot. Costume-themed bundle on the Shop tab. Try not to summon anything you can't kill -9.

shop.title: Cursed Cache
shop.description: 1200 💎 gems, 120 ✦ shards, 6 🎫 access cards. Stained, slightly sticky, but the contents are real.
